transcript: Speaker A: Sir second AC me kaise jana hai? [Sir, how do I go to second AC?] Speaker B: Go straight this way and after two compartments you'll reach the second AC coach. Speaker A: Sir samjha nahi, English achche se nahi aati. [Sir, didn't understand, I don't know English well.] Speaker B: Arey aaj kal ke zamane me English seekhna toh bohot important hai, seekh kyu nahi lete hain? [Oh, in today's era, learning English is very important, why don't you learn it?] Speaker A: Sir mere paas time kaha hai? Aapne kaha se seekha? [Sir, where do I have the time? Where did you learn it from?] Speaker B: Maine toh MySivi app se seekha hai, aur zyada time ki koi zaroorat nahi hai is app pe, bas 10-15 min practice karo and your English will get better in some days. [I learned from the MySivi app, and there's no need for much time on this app, just practice for 10-15 mins and your English will get better in some days.] Speaker A: Yeh MySivi app kya hai? [What is this MySivi app?] Speaker B: Iss app me ek AI teacher hai jiske saath tum bina kisi judgment ke English practice kar sakte ho. Aur best part ki galtiyan karoge toh AI turant correct bhi kar deti hai. [In this app, there is an AI teacher with whom you can practice English without any judgment. And the best part is if you make mistakes, the AI corrects you immediately.] Speaker A: Par sir, yeh app toh mehenga hoga na? [But sir, this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi, maine toh bas ek rupaye me shuru kiya tha, tum bhi kar sakte ho. [Not at all, I started for just one rupee, you can too.] Speaker A: Kaise start karu? [How do I start?] Speaker B: Bas install button pe click karo, MySivi app install karo and apne English learning journey shuru karo. [Just click on the install button, install the MySivi app and start your English learning journey.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Sir second AC; Go straight this way and after two compartments you'll reach the second AC coach; Sir samjha nahi, English achche se nahi aati; Arey aaj kal ke zamane me English seekhna toh bohot important hai, seekh kyu nahi lete hain?; Sir mere paas time kaha hai? Aapne kaha se seekha?; Maine toh MySivi app se seekha hai aur zyada time ki koi need nahi hai. bas 10-15 min practice karo and your English will get better in some days; Yeh MySivi kya hai?; Iss app me ek AI teacher hai jiske saath tum bina kisi judgment ke English practice kar sakte ho. Aur best part ki galtiyan karoge toh AI turant correct bhi kar deti hai; Par sir, yeh app toh mehenga hoga na?; Bilkul nahi, maine toh bas ek rupaye me shuru kiya tha, tum bhi kar sakte ho; Kaise start karu?; Bas install button pe click karo, MySivi app install karo and apne English learning journey shuru karo; MySivi English speaking app; Install Now
summary: A train passenger asks a ticket collector for directions in Hindi because he cannot understand English. The ticket collector recommends the MySivi app, explaining that it offers judgment-free AI-powered English practice for just 10-15 minutes a day, starting at only 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
